title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, both served via Virgo Network for high throughput. The video compares ASICs versus general-purpose GPUs and analyzes how scaling strategies affect LLM serving economics for inference and training.
